title: Utility For Minecraft
description: A modpack that improve performance and makes vanilla minecraft better.
body:
## **Better Vanilla And Minecraft Experience**

This modpack adds some quality of life features like changing skin in game, choose whatever type of cape you want, see saturation bars, new Flashback mod (its basically a better version of replay mod), Armor HUD and others.

###  Be careful using ViaFabricPlus
Some servers can detect you playing with this mod on another version and you can get banned. **Check if the server allows it** or do not use it. This mod is in the modpack **only for utility**.

### Configure IPN
If IPN is not configured personnally for you I advise you to **configure it before playing** because your inventory may look awful.

This modpack includes and **E4MC** mod to make playing with friends easier.

BSL, Complementary and makeup Ultra Fast shaders are included.
## **Performance Boost**

Mods like Sodium, ModernFix, Enhanced Block Entities, Entity culling, FerriteCore and others all together makes the game lighter and improves framerate on high and low end PCs.
**Nvidium** will (**if you does not use shaders and if you have a nvidia 2000 series or plus GPU**) make an amazing performance boost. (Nvidium isnt present in 1.21.1 first release version)
